overall.description: First-person exploration of a dimly lit cyberpunk apartment with hexagonal floor tiles, neon accents, and panoramic windows overlooking a futuristic cityscape. The player character moves through living spaces, observes an NPC on a couch, views the city through a large window, visits a bathroom and weapon workshop, then exits into a corridor with security personnel.

agents.ego_description: walking through the apartment entryway, passing a glowing pink vending machine and approaching the main living area

entered.detail: tall pink neon-lit vending machine with NC VM branding and menu display
dark hexagonal patterned flooring covering the apartment
recessed wall niche with built-in bed and storage shelves
dark ceiling fan with lights mounted on the ceiling
dark door leading to bathroom area with green exit sign nearby

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a dimly lit cyberpunk apartment entryway. A prominent pink neon vending machine stands to the right, while hexagonal floor tiles extend throughout the space. The camera moves forward past a bed niche recessed into the left wall, revealing a ceiling fan and the entrance to a bathroom area.

scene_state.functional_zone: living room with panoramic city window and holographic displays

events.description: approaching the large panoramic window increases natural daylight exposure

agents.ego_description: moving toward the living room window while observing an NPC sitting on the couch and the city view beyond

notable_agents.action: character sitting on the couch facing the coffee table, appearing relaxed

NPC with dark hair and tactical clothing sitting on the couch
low table with various items including magazines and electronic devices
wall-mounted array of screens displaying various video feeds and holographic interfaces
large panoramic window revealing a futuristic cyberpunk cityscape with steam vents

segments.scene_description: The camera enters the main living area where an NPC sits on a dark sectional couch. Holographic displays glow on the far wall. As the camera approaches the large panoramic window, natural light floods in revealing a detailed cyberpunk cityscape outside with steam rising from vents and neon signs visible on distant buildings.

scene_state.functional_zone: bedroom niche and bathroom area with city views

events.description: turning away from the window toward the bedroom and bathroom areas

agents.ego_description: turning from the window to explore the bedroom niche and bathroom facilities

entered.detail: futuristic skyscrapers with neon signage including Brooklyn Barista visible through the window
built-in bed with patterned bedding in a recessed wall niche
dark countertop with sink, toiletries, and a mirror with pink lighting
glass-enclosed shower with green directional arrows on the wall

segments.scene_description: Standing close to the window, the camera takes in the detailed city view with steam vents and neon signs before turning toward the bedroom area. The built-in bed niche becomes prominent, and the camera moves toward the bathroom, revealing a sink with toiletries and a glass shower enclosure.

scene_state.functional_zone: compact bathroom and weapon workshop with acoustic treatment

events.description: entering the bathroom area with sink and shower facilities
entering the weapon workshop room with acoustic foam walls and tool benches

agents.ego_description: moving through the bathroom facilities and entering a secure weapon workshop with organized equipment

entered.detail: walls covered with gray pyramid acoustic foam panels for soundproofing
wall-mounted storage system holding various firearms and equipment
metal workbench with tools, containers, and weapon maintenance equipment
tall cabinet with drawers for storage

segments.scene_description: The camera moves through the compact bathroom with its dark fixtures and pink-lit mirror, then transitions into a specialized weapon workshop. This narrow room features walls covered in acoustic foam, a workbench with tools, and organized weapon storage racks. The lighting shifts to a cooler, more industrial tone.

scene_state.functional_zone: apartment building corridor with security checkpoint

events.description: exiting the apartment into a public corridor with concrete floors and fluorescent lighting
passing a security guard and a woman in the corridor while continuing toward the exit

agents.ego_description: leaving the apartment through a sliding door and walking down a corridor past security personnel

notable_agents.action: security guard in reflective vest standing near the exit door
woman in tactical gear standing with arms raised near the wall

entered.detail: sliding door with frosted glass and green indicator light leading to the corridor
simple white benches along the corridor wall
NPC in security uniform with reflective vest standing near vending machine
NPC with weapon and tactical clothing standing in the corridor
spray-painted markings and symbols on the concrete floor

segments.scene_description: The camera exits the weapon workshop and moves through the apartment toward a sliding exit door. Entering a concrete corridor with fluorescent lighting, the scene reveals a security guard in a reflective vest and a woman in tactical gear standing near the walls. The camera continues down the hallway past benches and floor graffiti toward a distant exit sign.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a dimly lit cyberpunk apartment that transitions from a moody interior to a bright, panoramic city view before returning to the private quarters. It begins in an entryway characterized by hexagonal floor tiles and a glowing pink neon vending machine, moving past a recessed bed niche toward the heart of the home. As the camera enters the main living area, the dim light shifts as it passes a seated NPC and holographic displays, eventually opening up to a large panoramic window where natural light floods in to reveal a sprawling cityscape of steam vents and neon signs. After lingering on the detailed urban horizon, the perspective turns back toward the interior, gliding past the bedroom area and finally entering the bathroom to reveal a sink with toiletries and a glass shower enclosure.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the intimate, neon-lit interior of a private apartment into a sterile, industrial security corridor. It begins by gliding through a compact bathroom with dark fixtures and a pink-lit mirror before transitioning into a narrow weapon workshop. As the camera moves through this specialized space, the lighting shifts to a cooler industrial tone, highlighting acoustic foam walls and organized weapon racks. The scene then opens as the camera exits the workshop and passes through a sliding door, moving from the apartment's interior into a concrete hallway illuminated by harsh fluorescent lights. Finally, the camera proceeds down the corridor past a security guard in a reflective vest and a woman in tactical gear, continuing past floor graffiti toward a distant exit sign.
